name: ImmoScout24 Germany Real Estate Portal API
what_it_does: ImmoScout24 Germany real estate portal REST API for German estate agents, property managers, and PropTech companies to syndicate property listings, access German real estate market data, manage enquiries, and analyze the DACH (Germany, Austria, Switzerland) property market — Germany's largest online property marketplace owned by Scout24 AG with 14M+ monthly users. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for German real estate syndication automation, handle listing update for property status management automation, access property search for German buyer and renter discovery automation, retrieve market analysis for German property price trend automation, manage lead enquiry for estate agency CRM automation, handle valuation data for German property pricing intelligence automation, access neighborhood data for location analysis automation, retrieve rental index for German rent market automation, manage expose for property detail optimization automation, and integrate ImmoScout24 with estate agency CRM, property management, and DACH PropTech platforms for end-to-end German property market automation.
use_cases: Syndicating German property listings to ImmoScout24 for estate agency marketing automation agents
Accessing German real estate market data and price trends for property investment research automation agents
Managing buyer and renter enquiry leads from ImmoScout24 for German estate agency CRM automation agents
Analyzing German rental market indices and neighborhood data for property portfolio management agents
not_for: Non-DACH property markets (ImmoScout24 is Germany/Austria/Switzerland focused)
Commercial property only (ImmoScout24 is primarily residential; separate commercial module)
Direct transaction processing (ImmoScout24 is marketing portal, not transaction engine)
best_when: A German estate agent, property manager, or DACH PropTech platform wanting AI agents to syndicate property listings, manage leads, and access German real estate market data through ImmoScout24's dominant German property marketplace.
avoid_when: PARTNER PROGRAM REQUIRED: ImmoScout24 API access requires Scout24 technology partner agreement or estate agent membership; automated self-service developer access creates no API credentials. OPENIMMO FORMAT FOR LISTINGS: German property listings use OpenImmo XML format standard; automated JSON-only listing creates format rejection; automated must implement OpenImmo XML standard for German property data exchange. GDPR CONSENT REQUIRED FOR LEADS: German property enquiry data contains personal data; automated processing without GDPR consent creates data protection violation; automated must implement GDPR-compliant lead handling with consent records. GERMAN-LANGUAGE DOCUMENTATION: ImmoScout24 developer documentation is primarily in German; automated integration by non-German teams requires translation.

auth.notes: ImmoScout24 uses OAuth 1.0a (legacy) and OAuth 2.0 for API authentication. REST API with JSON and XML. Munich, Germany HQ. Founded 1998. Scout24 AG (MDAX:G24, acquired by Blackstone/Hellman & Friedman 2020, re-listed). Products: Residential sales/rental, commercial, new construction, mortgage, insurance, relocation. SDKs: None public. 14M+ monthly users. 80% German residential market reach. GDPR. Competes with Immowelt for German property portal dominance.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Sandbox for approved technology partners; production requires Scout24 partner agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Estate agent subscription: monthly fee based on listing volume; technology partner: negotiated
pricing.notes: Munich DE. Scout24 AG (MDAX). Partner agreement required. German-language docs. GDPR.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; listing and search APIs throttled; webhooks for lead events

known_agent_gotchas: OAUTH 1.0A LEGACY AUTHENTICATION: ImmoScout24 uses OAuth 1.0a for some API endpoints (not modern OAuth 2.0); automated OAuth 2.0-only assumption creates authentication failure on legacy endpoints; automated must support OAuth 1.0a signature computation for affected endpoints

OPENIMMO XML FORMAT REQUIRED: German property data exchange uses OpenImmo XML standard; automated JSON-only payload creates format_not_supported error; automated must generate and parse OpenImmo XML format for property listings

GERMAN-LANGUAGE DOCUMENTATION: ImmoScout24 API documentation is primarily in German; automated non-German team integration requires translation; automated error codes and messages may also be in German

GDPR CONSENT FOR LEAD DATA: German property enquiry leads contain personal data subject to GDPR; automated lead processing without consent record creates data protection violation; automated must implement GDPR consent management before processing leads

PARTNER AGREEMENT PREREQUISITE: ImmoScout24 API requires Scout24 technology partner agreement; automated immediate API access assumption creates partner onboarding step; automated must complete partner program before receiving credentials
agent_readiness.security_notes: Germany property portal. GDPR, BDSG, German AML. OAuth1/2. DE/EU. Property listing and lead data.

security_score_components.security_notes: German property portal. GDPR, BDSG. OAuth 1/2. DE/EU. Property and customer data.
